issue_title: Race condition in counter increment without lock
issue_body: self.counter += 1. counter.py:10 10:23. Non-atomic operation across threads. Use threading.Lock.

issue_title: TOCTOU race in file existence check
issue_body: if os.path.exists(path): open(path).write(data). file.py:17 17:45. Check-then-use race. Use try/except.

issue_body: if not instance: lock; if not instance: instance = Foo(). singleton.py:24 24:12. Not thread-safe in Python.
